top_signals.title: Samsung's shares surge as much as 6% after company ships next-generation AI memory chip samples
top_signals.summary: Shares of Samsung Electronics surged after the company began shipping HBM4E chip samples to its customers globally.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Non-Executive Directors of the National Wealth Fund reappointed
top_signals.summary: Nigel Topping, Tania Songini and Marianne Økland have been reappointed as Non-Executive Directors of the National Wealth Fund (NWF).
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: LG Electronics' shares surge 24% after showing automotive innovations using Google tech
top_signals.summary: Shares of LG Electronics surged after it unveiled automotive innovations using Google technology.

top_signals.title: Charter Communications data breach affects 4.9 million accounts
top_signals.summary: The ShinyHunters extortion gang stole personal information from 4.9 million accounts after hacking the U.S. telecom giant Charter Communications in early April, according to data breach notification service Have I Been Pwned. [...]
